_meta.coverage_note: Top 10 raw signals from ERM sources — unanalysed

items.title: Natural History Museum warns Earth reaching climate tipping points with more imminent
items.summary: Report highlights that Earth has warmed 1.4°C since Industrial Revolution, breaching 1.5°C limit soon, with glaciers melting, rainforests vanishing, and ocean currents collapsing. Relevant to climate tipping points as some like coral reefs may already be crossed.
items.domain_relevance: Climate tipping points: ice sheets, currents, reefs at risk beyond 1.5C

items.title: Yale E360: World hitting point of no return on 1.5C with tipping risks rising
items.summary: Three-year period ending 2025 first breached 1.5C threshold, overshooting goal and risking AMOC shutdown, Amazon dieback, ice sheet collapse. Relevant to planetary boundaries as tipping risks escalate post-1.5C.
items.domain_relevance: Planetary boundaries: 1.5C overshoot triggers major tipping elements

items.title: Carbon Brief experts rank Amazon dieback as top climate tipping concern
items.summary: Experts identify Amazon forest dieback as most worrying tipping point due to deforestation and drought impacts on carbon sink function. Ties to ecological risks from biosphere thresholds affecting food and ecosystems.
items.domain_relevance: Ecological risks: Amazon tipping impacts global carbon and food security

items.title: Phys.org: Climate scientists urge radical action as tipping points near
items.summary: New research shows world reached first Earth system tipping points like polar ice melt and Amazon dieback, urging urgent action to avoid catastrophe. Relevant to climate tipping points causing irreversible harm.
items.domain_relevance: Climate tipping points: First thresholds crossed, more loom

items.title: ESA details interconnected climate tipping points in Earth systems
items.summary: Arctic warming accelerates Greenland ice melt, slowing AMOC and disrupting Amazon monsoons, reducing carbon storage. Highlights reinforcing loops in tipping elements relevant to planetary boundaries.
items.domain_relevance: Climate tipping points: Arctic-AMOC-Amazon cascade risks

items.title: UCSB Bren: Greenland ice sheet collapse likely above 1.5C warming
items.summary: Nine core tipping elements like ice sheets and rainforests vulnerable post-1.5C, with Greenland melt raising sea levels 24 feet at higher thresholds. Pertains to ecological risks from locked-in changes.
items.domain_relevance: Ecological risks: Ice sheet tipping at 1.5-2.7C warming

items.title: Wikipedia updates: Tipping points possible at current 1C+ warming
items.summary: Tipping points feasible at over 1C warming, highly probable above 2C if trends continue. Relevant to planetary boundaries as current warming nears critical thresholds.
items.domain_relevance: Planetary boundaries: Tipping risks at 1-2C levels

items.title: Potsdam study via Yale: 25% chance of major tipping at 1.5C overshoot
items.summary: Modeling shows 1-in-4 risk of AMOC, Amazon, or ice sheet collapse if not returning to 1.5C by century end, escalating at 2C. Key for climate tipping points probability.
items.domain_relevance: Climate tipping points: Quantified risks post-1.5C

items.title: Hansen warns AMOC shutdown likely in 20-30 years without action
items.summary: Climate scientist James Hansen predicts Atlantic Meridional Overturning Circulation collapse soon unless warming reduced. Impacts ocean currents and global climate stability.
items.domain_relevance: Climate tipping points: AMOC collapse timeline forecast

items.title: Prof Hegerl flags biosphere tipping from heat-drought thresholds
items.summary: Expert concerned about tipping points in biosphere and human systems from heat or drought breaching thresholds, rippling to food and ecosystems. Relevant to ecological risks linkages.
